title: The Jute Companies (Acquisition of Shares) Ordinance, 1975
title_en: The Jute Companies (Acquisition of Shares) Ordinance, 1975
description: An Ordinance to provide for the acquisition of the shares in M/S Khan Brothers Limited, M/S Helal Jute Press Limited and M/S Rangpur Jute Press Limited. WHEREAS it is expedient in the public interest to provide for the acquisition of the shares in M/S Khan Brothers Limited, M/S Helal Jute Press Limited and M/S Rangpur Jute Press Limited and for matters connected therewith or ancillary thereto; AND WHEREAS Parliame...

provisions.title: 1. Short title and commencement
provisions.content:
1. (1) This Ordinance may be called the Jute Companies (Acquisition of Shares) Ordinance, 1975 .
(2) It shall be deemed to have come into force-
(a) in so far as it relates to M/S Helal Jute Press Limited and M/S Rangpur Jute Press Limited, on the 2nd day of January, 1972;
(b) in so far as it relates to M/S Khan Brothers Limited, on the 31st day of August, 1972.

provisions.title: 2. Definitions
3. Ordinance to over-ride other laws
provisions.content: 3. The provisions of this Ordinance shall have effect notwithstanding anything inconsistent therewith contained in any other law for the time being in force.

provisions.title: 4. Shares of jute companies to vest in Government
provisions.content: 4. On the commencement of this Ordinance, the shares in every jute company, which have not already vested in the Government by or under any law for the time being in force, shall, by virtue of this section, stand vested in, and allotted to, the Government free of any trust, mortgage, charge, lien, interest or other encumbrance whatsoever, and the Government shall, as from such commencement, be the sole shareholder of such jute company.

provisions.title: 5. Powers of Government in respect of jute companies
6. Provisions of certain law, etc. not to have any effect
provisions.content: 6. Every provision in any law or in any memorandum or articles of association of any jute company providing for any consequence to follow, or requiring any act or thing to be done, or entitling any person to do any act or thing or to take any action whatsoever, as a result of a reduction in the number of the members of such jute company below a certain number, shall be of no effect in relation to such jute company.

provisions.title: 7. Power of Government to modify Act VII of 1913
provisions.content: 7. The Government may, by rules, modify in their application to any jute company any of the provisions of the Companies Act, 1913 (VII of 1913), or of any rules made thereunder.

provisions.title: 8. Compensation
provisions.content:
8. The Government shall pay in respect of the shares vested in it under section 4 such compensation as may be determined by it:
Provided that such compensation shall not exceed the paid up value of such shares.

provisions.title: 9. Declaration
provisions.content: 9. It is hereby declared that the provisions of this Ordinance are made to give effect to the fundamental principles of state policy set out in articles 10 and 13(a) in Part II of the Constitution of the People's Republic of Bangladesh.

provisions.title: 10. Validation
provisions.content: 10. Notwithstanding any judgment, decree or order of any court, anything done, or purported to have been done, or any action taken, or purported to have been taken, in respect of any jute company under the Bangladesh Abandoned Property (Control, Management and Disposal) Order, 1972 (P.O. No. 16 of 1972), or under Acting President's Order No. IM-35/71/13, dated the 26th December, 1971, or under the Bangladesh (Taking Over of Control and Management of Industrial and Commercial Concerns) Order, 1972 (A.P.O. No. I of 1972), shall be deemed to have been done or taken in respect thereof under this Ordinance.

definitions.definition: M/S Helal Jute Press Limited, M/S Rangpur Jute Press Limited, or M/S Khan Brothers Limited.
